title: Wild Wonders
description: A Beta mod that improves world generation and adventure!
body:
![Wild Wonders text](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31ebeef638475796231a71acab26ff31b6bd9bce.png)

## Description

Wild Wonders is a Minecraft Fabric mod that improves the world by adding new features, mobs, items, and generation to biomes. The mod is supposed to improve exploration by making every biome more unique, with new blocks, plants, and animals. The mod should work great with vanilla; the textures, animations, and mechanics are all designed to mimic the ones that Minecraft introduces.

<details>
<summary>Q&A</summary>
  
### Am I allowed to use assets such as sounds, models and textures?
- No all our assets are not to be used.

### Will this mod release for anything other than fabric?
- We currently do not have anything planned.

### Am I allowed to redistribute the mod elsewhere?
- No only the lead developer is allowed to distribute the mod.

### Am I allowed to use code from this mod?
- No please do not use the code our developers made.

### Do I have to give credit if i use this mod in a post on any social media?
- Altough we do appreciate that you do you are not forced to credit us.

### Am I allowed to use your mod in a modpack?
- Yes! but please do credit the mod in this case if you do make a modpack that includes Wild Wonders we would be honord if you advertised your mod pack in our Discord server.

### Am I allowed to make add-ons or compatibility mods for this mod?
- Yes we have no problems with add-ons or compatibility mods.

### I want to help development on this mod can i join?
- Send a DM to Bananapowers on Discord if you are interested in helping.



</details>
